origin.paragraph1: I started in construction at sixteen. Summer laborer. Carrying lumber, digging footings, learning that the job site doesn't care about your excuses. Spent ten years building decks and railings — started my own company, scaled it from zero to $1.6 million in four years.
origin.paragraph2: The bigger the crew got, the worse the coordination got. I tried every piece of software out there. Jobber. ServiceTitan. Housecall Pro. My guys would open the app once, get lost in a maze of tabs and dropdown menus, and go right back to the group text. I was paying for software nobody used.
origin.paragraph3: So I built what should have existed all along. One app. Open it, see your jobs, know where to go. No training manual. No onboarding webinar. If your crew can read a tape measure, they can use OPS.
values.simplicity.label: SIMPLICITY
values.simplicity.description: If it needs a training manual, it’s too complicated. Every feature earns its place by being obvious.
values.reliability.label: RELIABILITY
values.reliability.description: Your crew shows up at 6am. Your software should too. Works offline. Syncs when it can. Never loses data.
values.respectForTime.label: RESPECT FOR TIME
values.respectForTime.description: A contractor’s time is money. Literally. Every tap in OPS is one we’ve justified. No busywork. No admin theater.
values.ownership.label: OWNERSHIP
values.ownership.description: Your data. Your operation. Your rules. We don’t lock you in. We keep your business by earning it every month.
bottomCta.heading: JOIN THE TRADES THAT RUN ON OPS
